prompt_text:
### Demographics: 71-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 19 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia; Intermittent GI discomfort (nausea/bloating)

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent); History of myocardial infarction
Body mass index category: Normal
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Major Depressive Disorder
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Cataract (status post surgery)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF (No); ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (younger sister)
- Social history: Current smoker (5 cigarettes/day for 30 years; ~7.5 pack-years); Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Dulaglutide 1.5mg once weekly; Duloxetine (60 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Nitrofurantoin (100 mg twice daily for prophylaxis)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 55.4 kg; Height 169.9 cm; BMI 19.2 kg/m²; Blood pressure 124/65 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.5%; 9 months ago 7.2%; 6 months ago 7.0%; 3 months ago 6.8%; current 6.9%), FPG (12 months ago 152mg/dL; 9 months ago 148mg/dL; 6 months ago 177mg/dL; 3 months ago 168mg/dL; current 136mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 54.8kg; 9 months ago 53.9kg; 6 months ago 53.3kg; 3 months ago 51.9kg; current 55.4kg), Height (12 months ago 169.9cm; 9 months ago 169.9cm; 6 months ago 169.9cm; 3 months ago 169.9cm; current 169.9cm), BMI (12 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 18.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 18.0kg/m²; current 19.2kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 127mmHg; 9 months ago 127mmHg; 6 months ago 125mmHg; 3 months ago 126mmHg; current 124mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 65mmHg; 9 months ago 65mmHg; 6 months ago 66mmHg; 3 months ago 64mmHg; current 65mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 17U/L; 9 months ago 10U/L; 6 months ago 20U/L; 3 months ago 11U/L; current 15U/L), AST (12 months ago 15U/L; 9 months ago 8U/L; 6 months ago 17U/L; 3 months ago 16U/L; current 12U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.9mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.9mg/dL; current 0.8mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 41mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 38mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 37mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 36mL/min/1.73m²; current 38mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 165mg/g; 9 months ago 227mg/g; 6 months ago 226mg/g; 3 months ago 153mg/g; current 160mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 80mg/dL; 9 months ago 85mg/dL; 6 months ago 82mg/dL; 3 months ago 85mg/dL; current 83mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 46mg/dL; 9 months ago 44mg/dL; 6 months ago 43mg/dL; 3 months ago 47mg/dL; current 45mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 172mg/dL; 9 months ago 184mg/dL; 6 months ago 169mg/dL; 3 months ago 169mg/dL; current 179mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.0g/dL; 9 months ago 10.2g/dL; 6 months ago 10.0g/dL; 3 months ago 10.2g/dL; current 10.1g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 0.62 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
